response.justification: Candidate has roughly 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems, which meets the raw years requirement. However, the role is a Director-level individual contributor Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy, cloud platform differentiation, and advising strategic customers — the resume shows no demonstrated AI/ML products, no platform-level architecture leadership, no advanced AI degree, and the title trajectory (Senior/Staff Developer) is well below Principal/Director IC scope. Recent MCP/agent tooling exposure is light and recent, not the recognized AI expertise this role demands.
strengths: ~15 years of polyglot full-stack and infrastructure engineering experience
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at Google
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, public talks, OSS)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise
Career level is Senior/Staff developer, not Principal/Director IC with strategy scope
No evidence of advising strategic customers or driving cloud/AI platform direction

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
Seniority gap vs. Principal/Director IC scope
Breadth of engineering experience across stacks
